queue.goal: Depth project — pick one project and go significantly deeper (real depth, not breadth)
queue.summary: Planned 5 BUILD tasks for HenryDB depth: secondary indexes, GROUP BY/HAVING, subqueries, ALTER TABLE, crash recovery stress tests.

queue.task: HenryDB: Secondary indexes — CREATE INDEX, DROP INDEX, automatic index selection in query planner
queue.summary: Secondary indexes: CREATE INDEX, CREATE UNIQUE INDEX, DROP INDEX. Non-unique B+ tree for duplicates. Index scan in query planner with AND residual. 24 new tests → 150 total.

queue.task: HenryDB: GROUP BY clause with aggregate functions, HAVING support
queue.summary: GROUP BY with aggregates (COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX), HAVING filter, multi-column grouping. 15 new tests → 165 total.

queue.task: HenryDB: Subqueries — scalar subqueries in WHERE, EXISTS, IN (SELECT ...)
queue.summary: Subqueries: IN (SELECT), NOT IN, IN (list), EXISTS, NOT EXISTS, scalar subqueries in comparisons. 15 new tests → 180 total.

queue.task: HenryDB: ALTER TABLE (ADD COLUMN, DROP COLUMN), column defaults
queue.summary: ALTER TABLE: ADD/DROP/RENAME COLUMN, RENAME TABLE, column defaults, index rebuild on schema change. 21 new tests → 201 total.

queue.task: HenryDB: Crash recovery stress test — simulate crash mid-transaction, verify WAL replay
queue.summary: Crash recovery stress tests: WAL integrity, uncommitted detection, rollback correctness, 20-tx interleaved stress, MVCC visibility. 22 new tests → 223 total.

queue.task: Midday housekeeping — git push, knowledge capture, dashboard update
queue.summary: Git pushed, scratch note for HenryDB, dashboard updated to 9282 total tests.

queue.task: Afternoon direction — assess progress, decide next depth work or blog post
queue.summary: Continue HenryDB depth: string functions (LIKE, CONCAT), window functions, views. Strong momentum from 126→223 tests.

queue.goal: Second depth project or blog post — consolidate learnings from recent work
queue.summary: Planned 4 more HenryDB depth tasks: string functions, window functions, views, DISTINCT.

queue.task: HenryDB: String functions — LIKE pattern matching, UPPER, LOWER, LENGTH, CONCAT/|| operator
queue.summary: String functions: LIKE pattern matching, UPPER, LOWER, LENGTH, CONCAT, || operator, BETWEEN. 21 new tests → 244 total.

queue.task: HenryDB: Window functions — ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK with OVER(PARTITION BY ... ORDER BY ...)
queue.summary: Window functions: ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK with PARTITION BY and ORDER BY. Aggregate windows (COUNT, SUM OVER). 14 new tests → 258 total.

queue.task: HenryDB: Views — CREATE VIEW, query from view, DROP VIEW
queue.summary: Views: CREATE VIEW AS SELECT, DROP VIEW, query from views (with WHERE, ORDER BY, LIMIT). Views reflect data changes. 12 new tests → 270 total.

queue.task: HenryDB: DISTINCT, COUNT DISTINCT, SELECT DISTINCT
queue.summary: DISTINCT: SELECT DISTINCT (dedup), COUNT(DISTINCT col), GROUP BY + COUNT DISTINCT. 12 new tests → 282 total.
